examples:
Command Example
!vectra-get-detections certainty_score_gte=20
Context Example
{
"Vectra.Detection": [
{
"Category": "LATERAL MOVEMENT",
"CertaintyScore": 22,
name: vectra-get-detections

outputs.description: The category of the vname attack detected Vectra.Detection.TargetsKeyAsset Flag indicating if the host has a detection targeting a key asset
outputs.name: Vectra.Detection.Category

outputs.description: The current certainty score correlated to this host Vectra.Detection.ID Object ID
outputs.name: Vectra.Detection.CertaintyScore

outputs.description: The timestamp when the event was first detected Vectra.Detection.LastTimestamp The timestamp when the event was last detected
outputs.name: Vectra.Detection.FirstTimestamp

outputs.description: The state of the detection Vectra.Detection.Threat_Score The threat score attributed to the detection
outputs.name: Vectra.Detection.State

outputs.description: The source IP address of the host attributed to the security event Vectra.Detection.SourceAccount A dictionary with fields that describe the Account the detection is from
outputs.name: Vectra.Detection.SourceIP
